# /obs monitor-deploy

Generates the complete monitoring setup for a new program deployment — metrics pipeline, health endpoint, alert rules, Grafana dashboard, and runbook — ready to deploy in under an hour.

## Usage

```
/obs monitor-deploy --program <PROGRAM_ID> --name <name> --tier <basic|standard|advanced>
```

## What Gets Generated

Based on tier, the agent produces files you commit to your repo and deploy:

---

## Tier: BASIC (30 minutes, zero infrastructure)

**Output files:**

### 1. `src/health.ts` — Health Check Endpoint

```typescript
// Generated by /obs monitor-deploy --tier basic
import { Hono } from "hono";
import { Connection, PublicKey } from "@solana/web3.js";

const app = new Hono();
const PROGRAM_ID = new PublicKey(process.env.PROGRAM_ID!);
const FEE_PAYER = new PublicKey(process.env.FEE_PAYER_ADDRESS!);

app.get("/health", async (c) => {
  const connection = new Connection(process.env.HELIUS_RPC_URL!);
  const checks: Record<string, { status: string; detail: string }> = {};
  let overall: "healthy" | "degraded" | "unhealthy" = "healthy";

  // RPC check
  try {
    const slot = await Promise.race([
      connection.getSlot("confirmed"),
      new Promise<never>((_, r) => setTimeout(() => r(new Error("timeout")), 5000)),
    ]);
    checks.rpc = { status: "pass", detail: `slot ${slot}` };
  } catch {
    checks.rpc = { status: "fail", detail: "timeout or unreachable" };
    overall = "unhealthy";
  }

  // Fee payer balance
  try {
    const balance = await connection.getBalance(FEE_PAYER);
    const sol = balance / 1e9;
    checks.feePayer = {
      status: sol < 0.1 ? "fail" : sol < 0.5 ? "warn" : "pass",
      detail: `${sol.toFixed(4)} SOL`,
    };
    if (sol < 0.1) overall = "unhealthy";
    else if (sol < 0.5 && overall === "healthy") overall = "degraded";
  } catch {
    checks.feePayer = { status: "warn", detail: "could not check" };
  }

  // Program existence
  try {
    const info = await connection.getAccountInfo(PROGRAM_ID);
    checks.program = {
      status: info?.executable ? "pass" : "fail",
      detail: info?.executable ? "executable" : "not found or not executable",
    };
    if (!info?.executable) overall = "unhealthy";
  } catch {
    checks.program = { status: "fail", detail: "could not check" };
    overall = "unhealthy";
  }

  return c.json({ status: overall, checks, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() },
    overall === "unhealthy" ? 503 : 200);
});

export default app;
```

### 2. `src/logger.ts` — Structured Logger

```typescript
// Generated by /obs monitor-deploy --tier basic
import pino from "pino";
import { AsyncLocalStorage } from "async_hooks";

interface RequestContext {
  requestId: string;
  walletType?: string;
  instruction?: string;
  signature?: string;
}

const contextStore = new AsyncLocalStorage<RequestContext>();

export const logger = pino({
  level: process.env.LOG_LEVEL ?? "info",
  mixin() {
    return contextStore.getStore() ?? {};
  },
  redact: ["*.secretKey", "*.privateKey", "headers.authorization"],
});

export function withContext<T>(ctx: RequestContext, fn: () => T): T {
  return contextStore.run(ctx, fn);
}

// Usage example:
// withContext({ requestId: crypto.randomUUID(), instruction: "swap" }, async () => {
//   logger.info({ amount }, "Executing swap");
//   const sig = await sendTransaction(tx);
//   logger.info({ signature: sig }, "Swap confirmed");
// });
```

### 3. Discord Alert on Critical Failure

```typescript
// src/alerts/discord.ts
export async function sendDiscordAlert(payload: {
  severity: "CRITICAL" | "HIGH" | "MEDIUM";
  title: string;
  detail: string;
  metric?: string;
  value?: number;
}) {
  const colors = { CRITICAL: 0xFF0000, HIGH: 0xFF8C00, MEDIUM: 0xFFD700 };

  await fetch(process.env.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL!, {
    method: "POST",
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    body: JSON.stringify({
      embeds: [{
        title: `${payload.severity}: ${payload.title}`,
        description: payload.detail,
        color: colors[payload.severity],
        fields: payload.metric ? [{ name: payload.metric, value: String(payload.value), inline: true }] : [],
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
        footer: { text: `Program: ${process.env.PROGRAM_ID}` },
      }],
    }),
  });
}
```

---

## Tier: STANDARD (4 hours, Grafana Cloud free tier)

**Everything in BASIC, plus:**

### 4. `src/metrics.ts` — Prometheus Metrics

```typescript
// Generated by /obs monitor-deploy --tier standard
import { Registry, Counter, Histogram, Gauge } from "prom-client";

export const registry = new Registry();
registry.setDefaultLabels({ program: process.env.PROGRAM_NAME ?? "unknown" });

// Transaction metrics
export const txTotal = new Counter({
  name: "solana_transaction_total",
  help: "Total transactions submitted",
  labelNames: ["instruction", "status"],
  registers: [registry],
});

export const txLatency = new Histogram({
  name: "solana_transaction_confirmation_seconds",
  help: "Time from send to confirmed",
  labelNames: ["instruction"],
  buckets: [0.5, 1, 2, 5, 10, 20, 30, 60],
  registers: [registry],
});

export const cuUsed = new Histogram({
  name: "solana_instruction_cu_consumed",
  help: "Compute units consumed per instruction",
  labelNames: ["instruction"],
  buckets: [10_000, 50_000, 100_000, 200_000, 400_000, 600_000, 800_000, 1_000_000, 1_200_000],
  registers: [registry],
});

export const rpcLatency = new Histogram({
  name: "solana_rpc_request_duration_seconds",
  help: "RPC call latency",
  labelNames: ["method", "endpoint_label"],
  buckets: [0.05, 0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 1, 2.5, 5],
  registers: [registry],
});

export const slotLag = new Gauge({
  name: "solana_slot_lag_slots",
  help: "Slot lag vs network tip",
  labelNames: ["endpoint_label"],
  registers: [registry],
});

export const feePayerBalance = new Gauge({
  name: "solana_fee_payer_balance_sol",
  help: "Fee payer wallet SOL balance",
  registers: [registry],
});

// Metrics endpoint
export async function metricsHandler() {
  return {
    body: await registry.metrics(),
    headers: { "Content-Type": registry.contentType },
  };
}
```

### 5. `alerting/rules.yml` — Prometheus Alert Rules

```yaml
# Generated by /obs monitor-deploy --tier standard
groups:
  - name: solana-dapp-alerts
    interval: 30s
    rules:
      - alert: TransactionSuccessRateLow
        expr: |
          sum(rate(solana_transaction_total{status="success"}[5m]))
          / sum(rate(solana_transaction_total[5m])) < 0.99
        for: 3m
        labels: { severity: p1 }
        annotations:
          summary: "TX success rate {{ $value | humanizePercentage }} (SLO: 99.5%)"
          runbook: "https://runbooks.example.com/tx-failure"

      - alert: RPCSlotLagHigh
        expr: max(solana_slot_lag_slots) > 50
        for: 2m
        labels: { severity: p1 }
        annotations:
          summary: "Max slot lag {{ $value }} slots — RPC may be degraded"

      - alert: FeePayerLow
        expr: solana_fee_payer_balance_sol < 0.5
        labels: { severity: p2 }
        annotations:
          summary: "Fee payer at {{ $value }} SOL — refill within 24h"

      - alert: FeePayerCritical
        expr: solana_fee_payer_balance_sol < 0.1
        labels: { severity: p0 }
        annotations:
          summary: "Fee payer at {{ $value }} SOL — CRITICAL, transactions will fail"

      - alert: ComputeUnitsSpiking
        expr: |
          histogram_quantile(0.95,
            sum by (le, instruction) (rate(solana_instruction_cu_consumed_bucket[5m]))
          ) > 900000
        for: 10m
        labels: { severity: p2 }
        annotations:
          summary: "p95 CU for {{ $labels.instruction }} at {{ $value }} — approaching 1.2M limit"
```

---

## Tier: ADVANCED (Week 2+)

**Everything in STANDARD, plus:**

### 6. OpenTelemetry Tracing Middleware

```typescript
// src/tracing.ts — Generated by /obs monitor-deploy --tier advanced
import { NodeSDK } from "@opentelemetry/sdk-node";
import { OTLPTraceExporter } from "@opentelemetry/exporter-trace-otlp-proto";
import { trace, context, SpanStatusCode } from "@opentelemetry/api";

const sdk = new NodeSDK({
  serviceName: process.env.SERVICE_NAME ?? "solana-dapp",
  traceExporter: new OTLPTraceExporter({
    url: process.env.OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT ?? "http://localhost:4318/v1/traces",
  }),
});

sdk.start();

const tracer = trace.getTracer("solana-dapp");

// Wrap any async operation with a span
export async function withSpan<T>(
  name: string,
  attributes: Record<string, string | number | boolean>,
  fn: () => Promise<T>
): Promise<T> {
  const span = tracer.startSpan(name, { attributes });
  return context.with(trace.setSpan(context.active(), span), async () => {
    try {
      const result = await fn();
      span.setStatus({ code: SpanStatusCode.OK });
      return result;
    } catch (err) {
      span.setStatus({ code: SpanStatusCode.ERROR, message: String(err) });
      span.recordException(err as Error);
      throw err;
    } finally {
      span.end();
    }
  });
}

// Usage:
// const sig = await withSpan("solana.sendTransaction", {
//   "solana.instruction": "swap",
//   "solana.program_id": PROGRAM_ID.toBase58(),
// }, () => connection.sendRawTransaction(tx.serialize()));
```

---

## Post-Deploy Checklist

After running `/obs monitor-deploy`:

```
[ ] Health endpoint responding: curl https://app.example.com/health
[ ] Metrics endpoint flowing: curl https://app.example.com/metrics | grep solana_
[ ] Test alert fires: temporarily lower threshold, wait for Discord/PagerDuty notification
[ ] Grafana dashboard loads with real data (not "No Data")
[ ] Runbook link in alert annotations is accessible
[ ] On-call rotation has been configured in PagerDuty
[ ] Fee payer auto-refill automation set up (or calendar reminder)
[ ] Program upgrade authority confirmed and documented
```
